The Problem

Every Minute Counts

Blood loss is the leading cause of preventable death in combat. Thousands of defenders — newly trained cadets, vehicle crews, emergency personnel — still deploy without a single tourniquet.

1,000+km
Active Front Line
90sec
Avg. Fatal Bleed Time
1000s
Unmet IFAK Requests

The medical supply gap at the front is a shifting target. Battalions expand and rotate continuously. New cadets graduate to the front without equipment. Emergency crews drive into conflict zones unprotected.

MP Foundation closes that gap — with speed, transparency, and verified delivery chains built on partnerships with the best logistics organizations operating in Ukraine today.

What We Do

Four Delivery Channels

We reach defenders wherever they are — before they deploy, when they request it, and before every vehicle leaves.

01
Front-Line Vehicles

Every vehicle transferred to the military via car4ukraine.com, NAFO community, drivingukraine.org, private volunteers and other charities is equipped with a set of our IFAKs before handover. Soldiers have tactical medicine from their first second of deployment.

02
Direct Unit Delivery

We respond to verified requests from combat units — delivering IFAKs and tourniquets directly to where they are needed most, with no warehouse delays and full documentary reporting.

03
Emergency Services

We supply Ukraine's emergency responders — DSNS, volunteer medics, and civil defense crews — who operate in active conflict zones and are the first to reach the wounded.

04
Training Centers

We equip cadets at military training centers before graduation — ensuring every new defender has an IFAK from day one on the front, not after their first engagement.

Operational Model

How We Work

A lean, verified supply chain from procurement to the front — no intermediary warehouses, no bureaucracy.

FunctionPartner / Source
Tourniquet ProcurementDNIPRO, SICH, MIC — certified Ukrainian manufacturers
IFAK Assembly & QCTraveling Colonels (Monte Dunard, USA) — veteran-led
Vehicle Logistics & Deliverycar4ukraine.com, drivingukraine.org, help99.io — “69th Sniffing Brigade”
Donor Coordination & Aid SourcingHands on Global Inc. — primary partner since founding

Why Partner With Us

What Sets Us Apart

✓
Verified Recipients Only

We respond exclusively to documented unit requests. Every delivery is tracked and reported with photos and documentation.

✓
100% Ukrainian-Sourced

DNIPRO, SICH, MIC — certified Ukrainian manufacturers. Supporting local industry while equipping defenders.

✓
Full Transparency

All deliveries covered with documentary reports and photo confirmation from the receiving units.

✓
No Warehouse Delays

Zero intermediary warehouses. Supplies move directly from procurement to verified units at maximum speed.

✓
AFU-Commended

25+ official Letters of Gratitude from the Airborne, SOF, International Legion, and frontline commands.

✓
Established Partner Network

Traveling Colonels, Hands on Global, car4ukraine.com — one of the most effective logistics chains to the front.

Protect a Defender Today

Every $80 puts a tourniquet in a fighter's hands before they need it.
